ddls:
CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Full name of the character */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the character's name */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the character */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the character */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the character */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the character */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the character's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "book_title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the book */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Publication date of the book */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the book */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the book */,
  "cover_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the book's cover image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_book_appearances" (
  "appearance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character's appearance in a book */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "aggressions" INTEGER /* Number of aggressions by the character in the book */,
  "paragraphs" INTEGER /* Number of paragraphs in which the character appears in the book */,
  "mentions" INTEGER /* Number of mentions of the character in the book */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the character's appearance in the book */,
  "positive_mentions" INTEGER /* Number of positive mentions of the character */,
  "negative_mentions" INTEGER /* Number of negative mentions of the character */,
  "neutral_mentions" INTEGER /* Number of neutral mentions of the character */,
  "first_appearance_paragraph_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first paragraph in which the character appears */,
  "last_appearance_paragraph_id" INTEGER /* ID of the last paragraph in which the character appears */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appearance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_book_appearances_first_appearance_paragraph_id FOREIGN KEY ("first_appearance_paragraph_id") REFERENCES paragraphs ("paragraph_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_book_appearances_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_book_appearances_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_book_appearances_last_appearance_paragraph_id FOREIGN KEY ("last_appearance_paragraph_id") REFERENCES paragraphs ("paragraph_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "paragraphs" (
  "paragraph_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each paragraph */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book the paragraph belongs to */,
  "paragraph_text" TEXT /* Text of the paragraph */,
  "paragraph_number" INTEGER /* Sequential number of the paragraph within the book */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Overall sentiment of the paragraph (positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "characters_mentioned" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of character IDs mentioned in the paragraph */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paragraph_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_paragraphs_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
